## Summary

- What changed
- Why it changed
- What risk was reduced/improved

## Checks

- [ ] `mvn -B verify` run
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Test categories considered (`unit`, `property`, `integration`)
- [ ] CI changes verified
- [ ] Docs updated (README/CHANGELOG when scope changes)

## Quality notes

- Evidence for coverage/report changes:
- Related issue / task:
